title: 10 Things to Do Before You Open the Phone
caption:
The phone is not the problem. Letting it go first is the problem.

Whoever speaks to you first sets the tone for your whole morning. Most men hand that slot to notifications — someone else's emergency, someone else's highlight reel, someone else's agenda.

You're better than that.

Ten things. Pick three. Start tomorrow.

Pray. Make your bed. Read one page. Move your body. Name your gratitude. Drink water. Pick your one non-negotiable. Thirty seconds of silence. Pray for one person by name. Decide who you're going to be today.

Save this. Start with the first one on the list.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #morningroutine #phonefree #manofgod #godlymen #selfmastery #christianity
